summary:
Familial transmission of drinking patterns persists into young adulthood, supported by a 7-fold increased risk in first-degree relatives and Cloninger’s classification of type 2 alcoholism involving early onset and paternal-to-son transmission. These findings demonstrate a continuous genetic and behavioral pattern through adolescence and into young adult life.  

$\boxed{A}$

These findings demonstrate a continuous genetic and behavioral pattern through adolescence and into young adult life.  

$\boxed{A}$. Answer choice: A
